brief_html: Changes the rank of a member of the clan.
remarks_html:
Changes the rank of a member of the clan.

The rank of the target username is changed and the target user receives S>C 0x81 SID_CLANMEMBERRANKCHANGE. All online members then receive a S>C 0x7F SID_CLANMEMBERSTATUSCHANGE to update their clan lists. You must be the leader or an officer of your clan and target username must be a member of a lower current and new rank.

Possible values of New rank:

  • 0x00: Initiate (Peon icon), in clan less than one week [not permitted]
  • 0x01: Initiate (Peon icon)
  • 0x02: Member (Grunt icon)
  • 0x03: Officer (Shaman icon)
  • 0x04: Leader (Chieftain icon) [not permitted; use C>S 0x74 SID_CLANMAKECHIEFTAIN for this purpose]
